response.overview: The story of a teenage person with disabilities who has autism named Syamil who deeply loves his father, older brother and older sister with all his heart. One day, Syamil faces a relationship conflict with his arrogant and conceited older brother about his career. Because of this matter, a tragedy befalls their family. What is the fate of this family's story?
response.title: Robohnya Rumah Kecil
